<?php /** * XHTML 1.1 Hypertext Module, defines hypertext links. Core Module. */ class HTMLPurifier_HTMLModule_Hypertext extends HTMLPurifier_HTMLModule { /** * @type string */ public $name = 'Hypertext'; /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config */ public function setup($config) { $a = $this->addElement( 'a', 'Inline', 'Inline', 'Common', array( // 'accesskey' => 'Character', // 'charset' => 'Charset', 'href' => 'URI', // 'hreflang' => 'LanguageCode', 'rel' => new HTMLPurifier_AttrDef_HTML_LinkTypes('rel'), 'rev' => new HTMLPurifier_AttrDef_HTML_LinkTypes('rev'), // 'tabindex' => 'Number', // 'type' => 'ContentType', ) ); $a->formatting = true; $a->excludes = array('a' => true); } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
